title: Build TrackFlow — Full Habit Tracker with UPI Payment & Admin Panel

requirements.text: Implement Internet Identity authentication. After successful login, redirect users to the pricing/plan selection page.
acceptanceCriteria: Login page displays Internet Identity sign-in button
Successful login redirects to /pricing page
Unauthenticated users are redirected to login when accessing protected routes

requirements.text: Create a pricing/plan selection page shown after login. Display three plans: Free (3 habits, basic checkbox analytics, no payment required — direct to dashboard), Starter (₹149/month), and Premium (₹399/month or ₹3,199/year). Free plan skips payment; paid plans proceed to the UPI payment flow.
acceptanceCriteria: Pricing page shows all three plans with features listed
Free plan button takes user directly to dashboard without payment
Starter and Premium plan buttons navigate to the UPI payment page with the selected plan pre-filled
Pricing in INR (₹149/mo, ₹399/mo, ₹3,199/yr) is displayed correctly

requirements.text: Build a UPI payment page for Starter and Premium plans. Display UPI ID yadavmannan007@okicici with a QR code placeholder, an input field for the user to enter their UPI transaction ID, a coupon code input field with validation, and a Submit button. On submission, save the pending payment request (user ID, plan, transaction ID, coupon used, timestamp) to the backend with status 'pending'.
acceptanceCriteria: UPI ID yadavmannan007@okicici is prominently displayed
Transaction ID field is required before submission
Coupon code field applies a discount if a valid coupon is entered
Submitted payment is stored with status 'pending' in the backend
User sees a 'Payment submitted, awaiting verification' confirmation screen after submission

requirements.text: Implement backend data models and logic for: Users (principal, name, email, phone, role, plan, planExpiry, createdAt, lastLogin), Habits (userId, name, goalType, goalValue, color, createdAt), Activities (userId, habitId, customName, startTime, endTime, duration, isProductive, earnings, notes, date), PaymentRequests (userId, plan, billingCycle, transactionId, couponCode, status, submittedAt, verifiedAt), and Coupons (code, discountPercent, usageLimit, usedCount, expiresAt, createdAt).
acceptanceCriteria: All data models are persisted in stable Motoko state
CRUD operations are available for all models
Plan limits (Free: 3 habits) are enforced at the backend
Payment status transitions (pending → approved / rejected) are handled

requirements.text: Build the Dashboard page (/dashboard) showing: welcome message with today's date, quick stats cards (Total Hours Today, Total Earnings Today in ₹, Productive Hours, Most Active Habit), an Add Activity form (activity name dropdown with add-new option, start/end time pickers with auto-calculated duration, productive checkbox, earnings in ₹, notes), Today's Timeline listing all activities for the selected date (each card shows time range, activity name, duration, earnings, productive badge, edit/delete icons), and Habit Progress Bars showing daily goal completion per habit.
acceptanceCriteria: All four stat cards display real data from the backend
Add Activity form validates required fields and submits successfully
Timeline updates immediately after adding/editing/deleting an activity
Progress bars reflect current vs. goal hours per habit

requirements.text: Build the Analytics page (/analytics) with a date range selector (Last 7 days, Last 30 days, This Month), a Pie Chart for time distribution by activity, a Bar Chart for daily earnings trend, a Line Chart for productivity trend, and summary stats (average daily hours, total earnings, most productive day, top 3 activities). Starter plan users see normal analytics; Premium users see full analytics; Free users see only checkbox-style basic analytics.
acceptanceCriteria: Charts render with real data from the backend
Date range selector filters all charts and stats
Free plan users see only basic checkbox-style analytics and an upgrade prompt for charts
Starter and Premium users see full chart analytics

requirements.text: Build the Activities page (/activities) with filter bar (date range, by habit, productive/unproductive), a table/list view with columns (Date, Activity, Duration, Earnings ₹, Productive, Actions), pagination (10 items per page), bulk delete, and Export to CSV button.
acceptanceCriteria: Filters correctly narrow the displayed activities
Pagination works correctly across pages
Bulk delete removes selected activities from the backend
CSV export downloads a valid file with all visible columns

requirements.text: Build the Habits page (/habits) showing all user habits with Add/Edit/Delete functionality (name, goal type daily/weekly, goal value in hours, color picker). Display current streak per habit. Enforce plan limits: Free users capped at 3 habits; Starter at 10 habits; Premium unlimited. Show an upgrade prompt modal when the limit is exceeded.
acceptanceCriteria: Habits list displays all habits with streak count
Add/Edit/Delete operations persist to the backend
Free plan blocks adding a 4th habit and shows upgrade modal
Starter plan blocks adding an 11th habit and shows upgrade modal

requirements.text: Build the Profile page (/profile) showing Google/Internet Identity profile info, an editable phone number field, account statistics (member since, total activities logged, total tracked hours, total earnings in ₹), a Delete Account button with confirmation dialog, and an Export My Data button that downloads a JSON/CSV of the user's data.
acceptanceCriteria: Phone number edits are saved to the backend
Account statistics reflect real backend data
Delete account removes all user data after confirmation
Export downloads a file containing the user's activities and habits

requirements.text: Build the Admin Panel (/admin) accessible via URL. The admin panel must include: a pending payments queue showing user name, selected plan, submitted transaction ID, coupon used, and Approve/Reject buttons; a users table (name, principal, phone, plan, signup date, last login) with ability to manually change a user's plan; a coupon management section to create new coupons (code, discount %, usage limit, expiry date) and view/delete existing ones; and platform-wide stats (total users, total activities, active users today).
acceptanceCriteria: Pending payment requests are listed with transaction IDs
Approve action sets user's plan and marks payment as verified
Reject action marks payment as rejected and notifies via UI
Admin can manually override any user's plan
Coupon creation form validates code uniqueness and saves to backend
Existing coupons are listed and can be deleted

requirements.text: Implement a collapsible sidebar navigation with icons for: Dashboard (Home), Analytics (Chart), Activities (List), Habits (Checkbox), Profile (User). The Admin link (Shield icon) is only visible when the authenticated user has the admin role. Apply a consistent Indigo (#4f46e5) primary color theme with Inter/Poppins font, card components, toast notifications, and loading skeletons throughout. Footer reads '© {year} TrackFlow. All rights reserved.'
acceptanceCriteria: Sidebar collapses to icons-only on toggle
Admin link is hidden for non-admin users
All pages use the Indigo primary color scheme consistently
Toast notifications appear for all async success/error actions
Loading skeletons display while data is being fetched
Footer appears on all pages with correct year

requirements.text: Apply a clean, modern productivity-app visual theme: deep Indigo (#4f46e5) primary with white card backgrounds, subtle gray surfaces, Inter/Poppins typography, generous spacing, and smooth micro-interactions (hover states, transitions). The design should feel professional and focused, suitable for a daily productivity tool.
acceptanceCriteria: Consistent color palette applied across all pages
Typography is uniform using Inter or Poppins
Interactive elements have clear hover and focus states

constraints: No Stripe integration — payment method is UPI only (yadavmannan007@okicici)
All monetary values displayed in INR (₹)
Authentication via Internet Identity only — no standalone Google OAuth
All Motoko logic must remain in the single main actor (backend/main.mo)
Do not modify files in frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui
nonGoals: Automatic payment verification (all UPI payments are manually verified by admin)

required: TrackFlow app logo — minimalist clock/checkmark combination mark in Indigo on white background (trackflow-logo.dim_256x256.png)
UPI payment QR code placeholder graphic with 'Scan to Pay' label in Indigo (upi-qr-placeholder.dim_300x300.png)
